_comment: ScarForge — Environment Tile Prompts. 32x32, seamless tileable. Use with scarforge-pixelart-building.json workflow (swap positive prompt). Name outputs with tile_ prefix for auto-sort into Assets/Sprites/Tiles/.
_naming: Save as: tile_floor_stone_01, tile_floor_dirt_01, etc. The sync script routes tile_* to Sprites/Tiles/.

prompts.tile_floor_stone_01: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy dungeon stone floor tile, cracked flagstone, mortar lines between stone blocks, 3-4 shading levels, scattered dark and light pixels for texture variation, muted desaturated gray-brown palette, dark value range, seamless tileable edges, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing
prompts.tile_floor_stone_02: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy dungeon stone floor tile variant, large irregular flagstones, hairline cracks, dried blood stain in corner, mortar lines, 3-4 shading levels, muted desaturated gray palette, dark value range, seamless tileable edges, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing

negative: blurry, smooth gradients, anti-aliasing, 3d render, realistic, photographic, modern, futuristic, sci-fi, bright saturated colors, neon, watermark, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, low quality, deformed, ugly, oversaturated, bloom, glow effects, white background, isolated object
